rationale: Adding batchSize to Scala reactive Observers; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule involved.
Scala-specific sealed trait/ADT codec support; language ergonomics, no MongoDB spec rule involved.
CI task to test MongoDB 4.2 in Evergreen; build/CI infrastructure, no spec conformance issue.
Scala BSON macro codec ClassCastException for Set type; internal codec bug, no BSON spec rule violated.
@BsonProperty annotation ignored in ADT case classes; Scala-specific macro bug, not a BSON spec violation.
Removing deprecated API elements; housekeeping, no spec behavior change.
UninitializedFieldError in macro-generated codec under -Xcheckinit; Scala compiler/macro bug, not spec-related.
Refactoring GridFS stream types to Observable[ByteBuffer]; internal API refactor, no spec rule violated.
Reverting NPE fix in SingleResultCallback-based Observables; reactive streams internal bug, not spec-related.
Deprecating DEFAULT_CODEC_REGISTRY constant; API housekeeping, no spec conformance issue.
Allowing implicits to be overridden via pass-by-name; Scala language ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
GridFSDownloadObservable fails for files >2GB; implementation overflow bug, no specific GridFS spec rule named.
GridFS upload observable does not complete with multiple stream elements; reactive streams bug, no spec rule violated.
BuildInfo generated in wrong package causing classpath conflicts; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Stack overflow in GridFS upload via IterableObservable with small chunks; reactive streams implementation bug, not a spec violation.
Deprecation warning emitted by createCodecIgnoreNone; API usability issue, no spec behavior involved.
Implementing BsonEncoder for Swift Encodable; new feature, not a spec nonconformance.
Making Document conform to Equatable; Swift API feature, no spec rule involved.
Nil out bson_t pointer on deinit to prevent freeing invalid addresses; memory management, not spec-related.
Error messages in MongoError enum not displayed when thrown; Swift error display bug, no spec rule violated.
Adding API documentation for Document class; docs task, no spec involvement.
Implementing missing Database.drop method; omitted from initial API sketch, no spec nonconformance context.
Auditing UnsafeMutablePointer.allocate/deallocate calls; memory management hygiene, no spec rule involved.
Switch from vendored libmongoc to system dylib; build/packaging change, no spec conformance issue.
Switching test framework to Nimble; test infrastructure housekeeping, no spec behavior.
Making Document mutability follow let/var Swift semantics; language ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Adding README; documentation task, no spec involvement.
Adding name property to collection/database objects; API convenience, no spec rule involved.
Converting benchmark results for Evergreen graphing; CI/benchmarking infrastructure, no spec behavior.
Fixing Xcode test runner for JSON file-dependent tests and updating README; test tooling, no spec conformance issue.
Making libmongoc OpaquePointers optional to prevent bad address frees; memory management bug, not spec-related.
Implementing custom RegularExpression struct for Codable conformance; Swift language adaptation, no BSON spec rule violated.
Implementing BSON Decoder for Swift Decodable; new feature, not a spec nonconformance.
Supporting strict decoding of Document to Decodable struct; new feature, no spec rule violated.
Adding JSON fallback in BSONDecoder for Stitch bare JSON values; feature addition, no spec rule violated.
Rewriting BsonEncoder to conform to Swift Encoder protocol; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
Converting options types to use new BsonEncoder; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
Swift 4.0 vs 4.1 compatibility issues (compactMap usage); language/build compatibility, no spec conformance issue.
Supporting encoding arrays at top level for Codable; feature addition, no spec rule violated.
Enabling Linux builds (LinuxMain.swift, segfault); platform support work, no spec conformance issue.
UpdateResult.upsertedId typed as Any instead of BsonValue?; Swift type-mapping improvement, no behavioral spec rule violated.
Description says fix removes read concerns 'the spec requires we omit'; driver was not omitting spec-required exclusions.
mongoc_init/cleanup never called; libmongoc API requirement, not a MongoDB protocol spec rule. CXX mentioned only as pattern reference.
Moving ReadConcernLevel type into ReadConcern namespace; API reorganization, no spec behavior change.
Accepting UnsafePointer instead of UnsafeMutablePointer where read-only; Swift pointer API improvement, no spec rule involved.
Driver reported libmongoc identity instead of Swift driver in handshake; spec requires correct client metadata in isMaster/hello.
CRUD spec defines hint and cursorType options; driver omitted them from initial implementation.
Supporting encoding/decoding of untyped BsonValues via Codable; feature addition, no spec rule violated.
Updating MongoMobile to use new MongoEmbedded ABI v1; build/dependency update, no spec conformance issue.
Re-enabling skipped CRUD collation tests after CDRIVER-2527 bug fix; test runner update to run previously disabled spec tests.
